subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! In the court of the True One thou art cherished, for thou hast attained unto this new bounty and received a portion from the ocean of favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا در درگاه حق عزیزی که باین فیض جدید رسیدی از دریای الطاف بهره و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
